app.title: Onyx
vault.openPrompt: Introduce la ruta de una carpeta de bóveda (una bóveda de Obsidian funciona tal cual):
sidebar.newNotePrompt: Path for the new note (e.g. folder/idea.md):
editor.placeholder: Selecciona una nota para empezar a escribir…
backlinks.title: Enlaces entrantes
outline.title: Esquema
settings.title: Ajustes
settings.importNothing: No Obsidian settings found in this vault
daily.open: Abrir la nota diaria de hoy
vault.passphrasePrompt: This vault is encrypted. Enter the passphrase:
vault.createEncryptedPrompt: Path for the new encrypted vault folder:
vault.newPassphrasePrompt: Choose a passphrase (min 8 characters). There is NO recovery if you lose it:
sync.enabledEncrypted: Sync enabled. Unlock this vault on another device with the same passphrase and keyfile to pair.
sync.enabledCode: Sync enabled. Pair other devices with this code: {code}
sync.joined: Joined synced vault. First sync starts shortly.
plugins.restartHint: Plugin changes apply when the vault is reopened
graph.title: Vista de grafo
insights.title: Estadísticas de la bóveda
insights.privacy: Calculado localmente. Nada sale de este equipo.
chat.title: Chat de IA
chat.empty: Ask anything. With the toggle on, the current note is included as context.
chat.placeholder: Message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
ai.storageNote: Stored on this device only — never in the vault
pair.codePlaceholder: Pairing code from the new device
pair.approveSas: Verify on both screens: {sas}. If it differs, tell the other device to cancel.
pair.showCode: On your existing device, enter code: {code} — waiting…
pair.confirmSas: Verification code: {sas}. Press 'Codes match' ONLY if the other screen shows the same.
rag.hint: Builds a local semantic index for vault-aware chat
rag.done: Indexed {chunks} chunks. AI chat now retrieves from your vault.
agent.title: Asistente de bóveda
agent.placeholder: What should I do? (e.g. fix broken links, add tags to untagged notes)
ai.keychainOn: 🔐 API key stored in your OS keychain
ai.keychainOff: ⚠ No OS keychain — key stored in an app config file
history.title: Historial de versiones
share.title: Compartir esta nota (enlace cifrado)
publish.title: Site title
publish.hint: Exports a static HTML site — host it anywhere
clipper.hint: Clip web pages into your vault via the browser extension
clipper.running: Listening on 127.0.0.1:{port}. Paste this token into the extension:
capture.placeholder: Capture a thought… (Ctrl+Enter to save, Esc to cancel)
mobile.tagline: Tus notas, tu servidor, tu IA.
mobile.vaultEncryptPrompt: ¿Cifrar este baúl con una frase de contraseña?
